oakland.source_name: City of Oakland Plan Area CW
oakland.source_reference: City of Oakland ArcGIS REST Services, Accela/Citywide_202410 MapServer layer 9, Plan Area CW
oakland.source_description: Official City of Oakland Bicycle & Pedestrian Program plan-area polygons. The service describes the same nine named areas used by the draft LHMP and says they follow census-tract and geographic boundaries.
oakland.coverage: City of Oakland plan areas; ten source features, nine configured LHMP areas plus one Gateway Industrial District feature withheld from assignment.
oakland.polygon_version: Citywide_202410 MapServer layer 9; source layer lists last update June 27, 2018; fetched 2026-06-17
limitations: Sub-area is assigned only by point-in-polygon against the official Oakland plan-area layer.
Do not infer sub-area from ZIP code, neighborhood name, street name, or nearest-label matching.
The official layer also contains a West Oakland - Gateway Industrial District (CFD) polygon that is not one of the nine configured LHMP sub-areas; it is not silently merged.
